name: Moesif
what_it_does: API analytics and monetization platform for tracking per-customer API usage, detecting anomalies, and enabling usage-based billing with drop-in middleware.
use_cases: Track per-customer API usage metrics including call volume, latency, and error rates with no code changes via middleware
Set up usage-based billing by metering API calls and integrating with Stripe or Recurly for invoicing
Detect API anomalies and alert on unusual usage patterns such as sudden traffic spikes or elevated error rates
Monitor your own agent-facing API to understand how AI agents are consuming your endpoints
not_for: Infrastructure-level monitoring such as CPU, memory, or Kubernetes pod health
Synthetic uptime monitoring of third-party APIs you do not control
best_when: Best when API providers need per-customer analytics and usage-based billing without building metering infrastructure from scratch.
avoid_when: Avoid when you need full APM tracing with distributed traces and spans rather than API-level call analytics.

auth.notes: Collector API uses an Application ID (public key) for middleware ingestion. Management API uses a separate Management API key with full account access. No scope granularity on management key.

pricing.paid_tiers: Paid plans from $200/month for higher call volumes and advanced features
pricing.notes: Free tier is generous for small APIs. Pricing scales with call volume and feature set.

performance.rate_limits: Collector API is designed for high throughput; Management API has standard rate limits

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Management API returns standard HTTP errors with JSON bodies. Middleware ingestion failures are silent to avoid impacting production traffic.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Event ingestion is append-only and not idempotent; duplicate events can be sent if retry logic is not carefully managed.
known_agent_gotchas: Middleware ingestion is fire-and-forget; errors do not surface to the application and must be monitored separately
Management API key has full account access with no scope restriction; treat as highly sensitive
Analytics queries have eventual consistency; freshly ingested events may not appear in reports immediately

security_score_components.security_notes: Management API key has full account access with no scope control, which is a security weakness. Collector Application ID is low-sensitivity. SOC 2 and GDPR compliant.
